name: GRIN Influencer Marketing API
what_it_does: GRIN influencer marketing REST API for DTC e-commerce brands to discover influencers, manage creator relationships, track campaign performance, automate product seeding, and measure ROI from creator partnerships integrated with Shopify, WooCommerce, and e-commerce platforms for data-driven influencer program automation. Enables AI agents to manage influencer discovery and recruitment for creator program automation, handle creator relationship and communication for influencer CRM automation, access campaign creation and management for influencer marketing automation, retrieve performance tracking and attribution for influencer ROI automation, manage product seeding and shipping for gifting program automation, handle content approval and UGC collection for creator content automation, access affiliate link and promo code management for influencer commerce automation, retrieve payment and compensation management for creator payout automation, manage contract and compliance for influencer agreement automation, and integrate GRIN with Shopify, WooCommerce, Klaviyo, and DTC platforms for end-to-end creator marketing automation.
use_cases: Discovering and recruiting creators from DTC influencer program agents
Tracking influencer campaign ROI from creator attribution agents
Automating product seeding from influencer gifting program agents
Managing affiliate links for creators from influencer commerce agents
not_for: Enterprise brand (Traackr or CreatorIQ for enterprise influencer management)
Small influencer one-offs (GRIN is programmatic management for ongoing programs)
Media influencer PR (GRIN is DTC e-commerce focused, not media/PR-first)
best_when: A DTC e-commerce brand with active influencer program wanting AI agents to automate creator discovery, relationship management, product seeding, campaign tracking, and ROI attribution through GRIN's Shopify-integrated influencer marketing platform.
avoid_when: INFLUENCER DATA DEPENDENT ON SOCIAL API ACCESS: GRIN influencer analytics depend on social platform API data (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube); automated performance data may be limited by platform API restrictions post-Cambridge Analytica; automated influencer analytics must account for API access changes. CREATOR COMMUNICATION IS PLATFORM-NATIVE: GRIN creator outreach and communication uses GRIN's built-in CRM and email; automated creator communication via GRIN requires GRIN platform access; automated direct email bypass of GRIN creates untracked communication outside CRM. PRODUCT SEEDING REQUIRES SHOPIFY INTEGRATION: GRIN product gifting uses Shopify store inventory; automated product seeding must have Shopify store connected; automated seeding without Shopify integration creates manual fulfillment required. API ACCESS IS ENTERPRISE-TIER: GRIN API access requires enterprise plan; automated API integration for non-enterprise customers creates access restricted; automated API enablement requires GRIN sales engagement.

auth.notes: GRIN uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Sacramento, CA HQ. Founded 2014 by Brandon Brown. Backed by Imaginary Ventures, Bessemer Venture Partners ($110M raised). Products: Influencer discovery, relationship CRM, campaign management, product seeding, affiliate tracking, content collection, payments. GDPR. SOC2. Shopify Plus Partner. Serves DTC brands. Competes with Aspire and Creator.co for DTC influencer management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales process required
pricing.paid_tiers: Custom enterprise pricing; typically $999-$5,000+/month based on creator count
pricing.notes: Sacramento CA. Bessemer backed. Enterprise annual contract. Per creator seat pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; creator and campaign APIs throttled; webhooks for campaign and payment events

known_agent_gotchas: SOCIAL PLATFORM DATA RESTRICTIONS: GRIN influencer analytics depend on social platform API access; Instagram and TikTok API restrictions post-2018 limit some analytics data; automated analytics may have gaps for creators who haven't connected social accounts to GRIN

CREATOR MUST BE ENROLLED IN PROGRAM BEFORE API OPERATIONS: GRIN API operations on creators require creator to be enrolled in brand's program; automated creator outreach must first enroll creator; automated API operations on unenrolled creator creates creator not found error

PRODUCT SEEDING REQUIRES SHOPIFY ORDER CREATION: GRIN product gifting creates Shopify orders for creator gift shipment; automated product seeding must have Shopify store connected and products available; automated seeding without Shopify integration creates manual fulfillment gap

AFFILIATE CODE UNIQUENESS PER CREATOR: GRIN affiliate codes must be unique per creator in brand program; automated affiliate code generation must check for existing codes; automated duplicate code creation creates code collision error

PAYMENT PROCESSING VIA THIRD-PARTY: GRIN creator payments are processed via third-party payment processor (not GRIN native); automated payment must understand GRIN payment integration setup; automated payment without payment processor configured creates payment disbursement failure
agent_readiness.security_notes: Influencer marketing. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Creator data and campaign performance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Influencer marketing. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Creator and campaign data.
